assertion_results.text: Step 1 extracts imprecise affected range from the Jira description — the description lacks a specific version threshold (Step 1 Data Extraction)
assertion_results.evidence: In data-extraction.md, line 15: 'Affected version range | "versions prior to the fix" (IMPRECISE -- no specific version threshold provided)' and line 16: 'Fixed version | "see advisory" (IMPRECISE -- no specific version provided)'. Lines 41-44 explicitly flag: 'The Jira description provides IMPRECISE version data: Affected range: "versions prior to the fix" -- this is not a machine-parseable version constraint. Fixed version: "see advisory" -- defers to external sources without stating a version.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries MITRE CVE API and extracts lessThan 0.4.8 as the fix threshold from the affected[].versions[] field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: In enrichment.md, lines 7-8: 'Source: `https://cveawg.mitre.org/api/cve/CVE-2026-48901`' and 'Extracted data from `containers.cna.affected[].versions[]`'. Lines 15-16 show 'Version constraint | lessThan 0.4.8' and 'Version type | semver'. Line 19: 'Fix threshold from MITRE: versions less than 0.4.8 are affected. Version 0.4.8 is the first fixed version.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 queries OSV.dev API and extracts fixed version 0.4.8 from the affected[].ranges[].events field (§1.62)
assertion_results.evidence: In enrichment.md, lines 23-24: 'Source: `https://api.osv.dev/v1/vulns/CVE-2026-48901`' and 'Extracted data from `affected[].ranges[].events`'. Lines 31-32 show 'Introduced | 0 (all versions from the beginning)' and 'Fixed | 0.4.8'. Line 34: 'Fix threshold from OSV.dev: fixed at version 0.4.8.'

assertion_results.text: Step 1.5 cross-validation shows agreement between MITRE and OSV.dev — the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) is used as the authoritative value for Step 2.3
assertion_results.evidence: In enrichment.md, line 46: 'Cross-Validation Result: AGREEMENT'. Lines 48-49: 'MITRE: lessThan: 0.4.8 (versions below 0.4.8 are affected)' and 'OSV.dev: fixed: 0.4.8 (version 0.4.8 is the fix)'. Lines 57-59: 'Authoritative fix threshold: 0.4.8 — This enriched value (from cross-validated external CVE data) supersedes the imprecise Jira description and will be used as the comparison baseline in Step 2.3 for version impact analysis.'

assertion_results.text: Step 2.3 version impact comparison uses the enriched fix threshold (0.4.8) from Step 1.5, not the imprecise Jira description data
assertion_results.evidence: In version-impact.md, lines 5-7: 'From Step 1.5 cross-validation: h2 < 0.4.8 are affected (fix threshold: 0.4.8). This enriched threshold is used for all comparisons below, replacing the imprecise Jira description data ("versions prior to the fix").' All version comparisons use 0.4.8 as the threshold, e.g., line 15: 'h2 0.4.8 >= 0.4.8 (at fix threshold)', line 28: 'h2 0.4.5 < 0.4.8'.
